description: Letter/petition appealing for charity or other assistance. Fragment (upper left corner). In Judaeo-Arabic. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Written on behalf of al-Maghribī al-Shaʿʿāb and addressed to two judges. None of the substance of the request is preserved. However, JRL SERIES AF 248 (PGPID 32594), JRL SERIES AF 249 (PGPID 32595), and JRL SERIES AF 255 (PGPID 32596) all may be from the same letter.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בJRL.
